name: ChordRush
author: Panda Hub
description: ChordRush is a MIDI-powered auto piano player for Roblox virtual piano games. It streams a built-in song library from GitHub across categories like Modern, Anime, Classical, Movie, Emotional, and Game OST — or plays your own local MIDI files stored in the ChordRushMidi folder. Features include a live song browser with search, manual and Auto BPM mode, a seekable progress bar, float mode with recording mode support, and a compact draggable UI with a detachable side panel.
howToUse:
1. Click the ♪ Song Browser button to open the track list panel
2. Pick a category from the dropdown (Custom, Modern, Anime, Classical, etc.) and click a song to select it
3. Adjust BPM manually or toggle Auto BPM to follow the MIDI tempo, then press ▶ to play
